calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition Of 2614 Sacramento Street, Llc, To Cancel Release The Mechanics Lien
Off Calendar Jun-18-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Kevin Greenquist, 415.977.0444 of Zaghi Torress Arshawsky LLP for Petitioner 2614 Sacramento Street, LLC.
No other appearances.

Discussed. Mr. Greenquist provides the Court with a Proof of Service showing that the Petition was served with 15 days notice of the May 30, 2019 hearing.

The Court rules as follows: PETITIONER 2614 SACRAMENTO STREET, LLC Notice Of Hearing On Petition Of 2614 Sacramento Street, Llc, To Cancel Release The Mechanics Lien is
Granted. Petitioners request for fee per statue is granted. Order signed. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

Notice Of Hearing On Petition Of 2614 Sacramento Street, Llc, To Cancel Release The Mechanics Lien
Off Calendar Jun-13-2019 Continued To Jun-18-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Kevin Greenquist, 415.977.0444 of Zaghi Torress Arshawsky LLP for Petitioner 2614 Sacramento Street, LLC.
No other appearances.

Discussed. The Court rules as follows: PETITIONER 2614 SACRAMENTO STREET, LLC Notice Of Hearing On Petition Of 2614 Sacramento Street, Llc, To Cancel Release The Mechanics Lien is continued to June 18, 2019. Petitioner must provide the Court with a Proof of Service showing that the Notice of hearing and the Petition was served with 15 days notice of the May 30, 2019 hearing. Plaintiff to give notice. Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

Notice Of Hearing On Petition Of 2614 Sacramento Street, Llc, To Cancel Release The Mechanics Lien
